_comment: Mutation-testing gate for the money-critical commerce paths. The listing escrow money code lives in its OWN file (listings-escrow.ts, extracted P2.4). The ranges below still scope to the fee/escrow/payment DECISION lines (notification-copy tails deliberately OUT), but the churn the old config suffered is gone: those ranges used to shift on every unrelated CATALOG edit because the money code shared listings.ts. Now catalog edits can't move them — only editing the escrow code itself does, and that already puts you in the mutation-gate mindset. Covers completeListingPurchase (fee math, ship-by deadline, reserved ledger), purchaseListing (fee math), shipListing capture-vs-dead-auth + captured ledger, confirmListingDelivery capture + released ledger, releaseExpiredReservation cancel/revert + cancelled ledger. Commissions money: single range (335-566). Run: npm run test:mutation. break=92; residual survivors are fail()/label copy + the un-simulatable single-threaded race guard.
